name: Architect Graph View
summary: High-level architecture graph view showing system components and their dependencies
goals: Render a system architecture overview graph
Show component dependencies and data flow

specDetail.description: An ArchitectGraph component that renders a high-level architecture diagram of the system. Shows modules, services, and their interconnections as a directed graph. Supports zooming, panning, and component selection for drill-down.

parameters.name: onComponentSelect
parameters.description: Callback when a component is clicked

constraints: Must render architecture components with distinct visual styling per type (frontend, backend, service)
Must show data flow direction with animated arrows
Must support drill-down from architecture component to detailed spec view

acceptanceCriteria.given: the system has defined architecture components
acceptanceCriteria.when: the architect graph view is loaded
acceptanceCriteria.then: an interactive architecture diagram is rendered with components and data flow arrows

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
